caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT!", a black baseball cap with a gold logo, and over-ear headphones. He wears several gold chains around his neck. A professional broadcast microphone is positioned directly in front of him. The background features a white wall with gold stars and text that reads "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A large sign behind the man reads "BOSS TALK 101". Two graphic overlays are present on the screen: one on the left featuring a microphone icon and the text "PODCAST", and another on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a steady profile view, slightly smiling and looking toward someone off-screen, with very little movement as he listens or prepares to speak.
